Est. 2017  —  Meridian, Idaho

How It All Started.
The Origin Story.

From mattresses on the floor during a solar eclipse to one of the most tech-forward short-term rental companies in the country.

Est. 2017  —  Meridian, Idaho
How It All Started
◆
The Brand & Origin Story of Premium Rentals
The Accidental Beginning
August 21, 2017
The Solar Eclipse That Started Everything
Kacey had spent most of his life renovating and flipping homes — from his teenage years forward, real estate was never just a career, it was a calling. By day he was rising through the corporate world; at heart always the guy who saw a rundown property and envisioned what it could become.

When he and Tiffanie got married, that passion became theirs together — her extraordinary eye for design and beauty transforming every space they touched.

Then came August 21st, 2017. Idaho was in the path of totality and Airbnb prices were outrageous. Tiffanie had an idea: "We just finished a renovation — why don't we throw it on Airbnb for the eclipse weekend?"
What followed was pure, beautiful chaos. They ran all over the valley grabbing free toss-out furniture, thrift store finds, mattresses on the floor. One purpose: survive a single weekend rental.

It didn't book. 😂

But future dates started quietly rolling in. They felt obligated to honor them. More came. And more. They never had a chance to turn it off — so they decided not to.
"We did everything wrong and somehow started a company."
Accidental Becomes Intentional
2018 — 2019
McCall. Hawaii. A Model That Wouldn't Quit.
The eclipse listing kept performing. In 2018: what if we had a cabin in McCall? The monthly cost hard to justify — unless they rented it out. So they did.

It worked. 2019: what about Hawaii? Same logic. Same result. Friends and family started asking how they were doing it. Could they help? The snowball started rolling.
One eclipse listing had become a multi-state operation. And Kacey was still showing up to his day job every single morning.
✓ Meridian, Idaho
✓ McCall, Idaho
✓ Hawaii
✓ Friends & family portfolio growing
✓ Still technically a side gig
The Year Everything Changed
2021 — All In
The Day Job Ends. The Real Company Begins.
At the time, Kacey was the Regional Director for one of the largest RV dealerships in the nation — a highly successful career built alongside everything else. He and Tiffanie were also raising four kids (with two more on the way), operating at full capacity every single day.

Yet the rental business kept growing — properties across Idaho and Hawaii, a swelling friends-and-family portfolio, a side gig that had quietly become anything but small. Something had to give.

In 2021, Kacey walked away from his career. PremiumRentals.us gave way to PremiumRentals.com, purchased at premium — because that's what the company had become.
Tiffanie led the creative vision, working hand-in-hand with a professional logo design firm for the first time — producing the navy house mark, clean lettering, and cursive flourish that became Premium Rentals' first real identity.

The first employees were hired. Four years of lone-wolf hustle, officially over.
With structure in place, the two forces that had always driven this company had room to fully operate:
The Tech Brain
Kacey
Deep technology background powering Premium Rentals at scale — 50+ booking channel integrations, AI integrations including pricing that web-scrapes every hotel and STR in the market in real time, smart locks, thermostat automation, and demand forecasting built for national reach.
The Design Eye
Tiffanie
What started with thrift store furniture evolved into something entirely different. Tiffanie's instinct for beauty, staging, and intentional design turned every property into a high-end, professionally curated experience — raising the bar on what a short-term rental can feel like.
Booking reach
50+ channels
Pricing intelligence
AI integrations + live market data
Property tech
Smart locks & thermostats
Portfolio reach
Idaho, Hawaii & expanding
"We didn't just build a rental company. We built the system that runs it — and the properties worth staying in."
✓ Kacey leaves corporate career
✓ PremiumRentals.com secured
✓ Professional rebrand
✓ First employees hired
✓ Tech stack built out
✓ Side gig officially retired
Putting Down Roots
Early 2025
The First Premium Rentals HQ — Built & Renovated
From Idaho to Hawaii and continuing to expand, Premium Rentals had grown into one of the most tech-forward short-term rental management companies in the U.S. The next move was inevitable: a real headquarters.

We built out and renovated 3140 W Belltower Dr., Suite 100, Meridian, Idaho — physical proof that what started with mattresses on the floor deserved a proper address.

And once the walls were painted and the doors open — naturally — we looked at each other and said it again: "Time to make it even prettier."
3140 W Belltower Dr. Suite 100  ◆  Meridian, Idaho 83646
A New Chapter
April 10, 2026
New Branding. New Website. New Home.
A New Chapter Begins
Five years to the day from the first big rebrand
From mattresses on the floor to one of the most innovative, tech-forward short-term rental management companies in the country.

New branding. New website. New headquarters. Same unstoppable team.

Who Dis? 🔑   And it feels like we're just getting started.
New Brand

New HQ
